name: harness
description: Team-architecture factory meta-skill that generates agent teams and the skills they use.

interface.shortDescription: Build an agent team and the skills they use from a domain description
interface.longDescription: Harness is a team-architecture factory: describe a domain or project and it defines specialist agents (.claude/agents/) and generates the skills they use (.claude/skills/), choosing from six team-architecture patterns — pipeline, fan-out/fan-in, expert pool, producer-reviewer, supervisor, and hierarchical delegation.
defaultPrompt: Build a harness for this project
Design an agent team for this domain
Audit and sync my existing harness
